name: Classic Nasi Lemak
description: Fragrant coconut rice with sambal, egg, peanuts, anchovies and cucumber.

name: Ayam Rendang Rice
description: Slow-cooked chicken in a rich coconut and spice gravy, served with rice.

name: Sambal Prawn Bowl
description: Juicy prawns tossed in house sambal with seasonal greens and steamed rice.

name: Curry Puffs
description: Two flaky handmade pastries filled with curried potato and chicken.

name: Crispy Tofu Bites
description: Golden tofu cubes with sweet soy glaze, chilli and toasted sesame.

name: Ondeh Ondeh
description: Pandan rice cakes filled with molten gula melaka and fresh coconut.

name: Pandan Chiffon Slice
description: An airy pandan cake made in small batches with coconut milk.

name: Iced Lemongrass Tea
description: House-brewed lemongrass tea with calamansi and a touch of honey.
